pan-africa-import-duty.label: Import Duty Cluster
pan-africa-import-duty.sectionTitle: Estimate landed cost before you import

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: Import costs across Africa usually start with CIF, then stack customs duty, VAT, and market-specific levies. If you only budget for the headline duty rate, you usually underprice the true landed cost.

primaryCta.title: Run a landed-cost estimate
primaryCta.body: Model customs duty, VAT, levies, and per-unit landed cost for major African markets before you ship.
primaryCta.label: Open Import Duty Calculator

relatedTools.title: Currency Converter
relatedTools.reason: Check FX impact on customs cost and supplier pricing.

relatedTools.title: Remittance Compare
relatedTools.reason: Compare how you fund supplier payments across corridors.

relatedTools.title: Invoice Generator
relatedTools.reason: Prepare commercial paperwork and landed-cost documentation.

relatedGuides.title: Nigeria Import Duty Guide
relatedGuides.reason: Duty, VAT, CISS, ETLS, and common product examples.

relatedGuides.title: Kenya Import Duty Guide
relatedGuides.reason: KRA duty, IDF, RDL, and VAT explained.

relatedGuides.title: South Africa Import Duty Guide
relatedGuides.reason: SARS customs treatment, VAT, and product comparisons.

followUpQuestions.question: What costs are usually missed on import budgets?
followUpQuestions.answer: Freight, insurance, customs levies, VAT on a duty-inclusive base, port charges, and FX swings are the most common blind spots.

followUpQuestions.question: When should I use the calculator?
followUpQuestions.answer: Use it before placing the order, again when freight is confirmed, and once more before final customs clearance.

nigeria-import-duty.label: Nigeria Import Duty
nigeria-import-duty.sectionTitle: Calculate Nigeria landed cost before shipping

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: Nigeria import duty usually starts from CIF, then adds duty, product levies, 7.5% VAT, CISS, ETLS, and handling costs. The real cost is often materially higher than the supplier invoice.

primaryCta.title: Price your shipment with the Nigeria calculator
primaryCta.body: Estimate NCS duty, VAT, levies, and per-unit landed cost before you commit capital.
primaryCta.label: Calculate Nigeria Import Duty

relatedTools.title: Currency Converter
relatedTools.reason: Stress-test USD to NGN movement on import margins.

relatedTools.title: Invoice Generator
relatedTools.reason: Prepare cleaner supplier and customs paperwork.

relatedGuides.title: Nigeria Income Tax Guide
relatedGuides.reason: Useful if imports sit inside a wider business tax plan.

relatedGuides.title: VAT Rates in Africa
relatedGuides.reason: Compare Nigeria VAT treatment with other African markets.

followUpQuestions.question: Why do two importers quote very different margins on the same goods?
followUpQuestions.answer: They often model different freight assumptions, levy classes, customs values, or exchange rates.

followUpQuestions.question: What should I confirm before paying a supplier?
followUpQuestions.answer: Confirm HS classification, shipping terms, destination charges, and the exchange-rate assumption used in your costing.

kenya-import-duty.label: Kenya Import Duty
kenya-import-duty.sectionTitle: Model KRA duty before goods land in Kenya

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: Kenya landed cost usually combines customs duty, IDF, RDL, VAT, and sometimes excise on top of CIF. The headline duty band is only one part of what importers actually pay.

primaryCta.title: Estimate Kenya import duty and KRA charges
primaryCta.body: Check customs duty, IDF, RDL, VAT, and per-unit landed cost before you import.
primaryCta.label: Calculate Kenya Import Duty

relatedTools.title: Currency Converter
relatedTools.reason: Track KES exposure while pricing supplier invoices.

relatedTools.title: Remittance Compare
relatedTools.reason: Compare supplier payment routes and transfer fees.

relatedGuides.title: Kenya Income Tax Guide
relatedGuides.reason: Map import margins against payroll and tax obligations.

relatedGuides.title: Mobile Money Fees in Africa Compared
relatedGuides.reason: Useful if supplier or distributor cashflow runs through mobile money.

followUpQuestions.question: Which KRA charges are most often forgotten?
followUpQuestions.answer: IDF, RDL, VAT on a duty-inclusive base, and excise on selected goods are common omissions.

followUpQuestions.question: When does excise matter?
followUpQuestions.answer: Excise becomes important on product classes like vehicles, alcohol, and selected consumer goods.

ghana-import-duty.label: Ghana Import Duty
ghana-import-duty.sectionTitle: Estimate Ghana import cost before clearance

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: Ghana import pricing usually combines customs duty, VAT, NHIL, GETFund, inspection and port charges. The full landed cost is broader than the basic duty rate.

primaryCta.title: Estimate Ghana duty, VAT, and landed cost
primaryCta.body: Run a fast customs model for Ghana before you commit to stock or freight.
primaryCta.label: Calculate Ghana Import Duty

relatedTools.title: Currency Converter
relatedTools.reason: Track GHS exposure on import margins.

relatedTools.title: Invoice Generator
relatedTools.reason: Create cleaner commercial and customs paperwork.

relatedGuides.title: VAT Rates in Africa
relatedGuides.reason: Compare Ghana's tax stack with peer markets.

relatedGuides.title: Best Way to Send Money to Ghana
relatedGuides.reason: Useful for funding cross-border purchases and supplier settlements.

followUpQuestions.question: Why should I model local taxes separately from customs duty?
followUpQuestions.answer: Because VAT and related health or education levies often apply on a broader tax base than the initial duty calculation.

followUpQuestions.question: Who benefits most from a landed-cost calculator?
followUpQuestions.answer: Importers, distributors, retailers, and anyone comparing suppliers or product classes before ordering.

south-africa-import-duty.label: South Africa Import Duty
south-africa-import-duty.sectionTitle: Check SARS customs cost before you import

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: South African landed cost usually combines customs duty, VAT, and product-specific treatment under SARS customs rules. Some goods attract 0% duty but still carry meaningful VAT and shipping exposure.

primaryCta.title: Estimate South Africa customs and VAT
primaryCta.body: Model SARS duty, VAT, and landed cost before you price or order inventory.
primaryCta.label: Calculate South Africa Import Duty

relatedTools.title: Currency Converter
relatedTools.reason: Stress-test ZAR movement on your landed cost.

relatedTools.title: Invoice Generator
relatedTools.reason: Keep import and resale paperwork cleaner.

relatedGuides.title: South Africa Income Tax Guide
relatedGuides.reason: Useful if import cost sits inside wider business planning.

relatedGuides.title: South Africa Tax Brackets 2025/26
relatedGuides.reason: Helpful context for payroll and owner-compensation planning.

followUpQuestions.question: Why can 0% duty goods still feel expensive to import?
followUpQuestions.answer: Because freight, insurance, VAT, broker fees, and port charges still move the true landed cost materially.

followUpQuestions.question: What is the best use of this page?
followUpQuestions.answer: Use it to compare sourcing options, price inventory, and avoid margin surprises before shipment.

nigeria-income-tax.label: Nigeria Income Tax
nigeria-income-tax.sectionTitle: Turn tax guidance into an exact take-home number

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: Nigeria take-home pay depends on the tax regime, pension treatment, statutory deductions, and how your employer structures pay. Reading the rules helps; using the calculator shows the actual number.

primaryCta.title: Calculate Nigeria PAYE and take-home pay
primaryCta.body: Compare old and new tax treatment, pension, NHF, and net salary in one place.
primaryCta.label: Open Nigeria PAYE Calculator

relatedTools.title: Minimum Wage Checker
relatedTools.reason: Benchmark salary floors and compliance context.

relatedTools.title: Overtime Calculator
relatedTools.reason: Model how extra pay changes real take-home compensation.

relatedTools.title: Japa Cost Calculator
relatedTools.reason: Useful if you are comparing staying local vs relocating.

relatedGuides.title: How to Calculate PAYE in Nigeria
relatedGuides.reason: A rule-by-rule walkthrough for the calculator inputs.

relatedGuides.title: Nigeria Tax Act 2026 Changes
relatedGuides.reason: What changed and who is affected most.

relatedGuides.title: Salary After Tax in Nigeria
relatedGuides.reason: Compare salary bands and real take-home expectations.

followUpQuestions.question: Why is my effective tax rate lower than the top bracket?
followUpQuestions.answer: Progressive systems tax slices of income at different rates, so your blended rate is usually below the top marginal rate.

followUpQuestions.question: What should I check if my payslip looks wrong?
followUpQuestions.answer: Check the salary basis, pensionable pay, statutory deductions, and the tax regime your employer is using.

kenya-income-tax.label: Kenya Income Tax
kenya-income-tax.sectionTitle: Use the KRA calculator, not guesswork

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: Kenya take-home pay is shaped by PAYE, NSSF, SHIF, housing levy, and employer payroll setup. Even small deduction changes can materially change monthly net pay.

primaryCta.title: Calculate Kenya PAYE and net salary
primaryCta.body: Estimate KRA PAYE, NSSF, SHIF, and housing levy using one calculator.
primaryCta.label: Open Kenya PAYE Calculator

relatedTools.title: Salary Compare
relatedTools.reason: Benchmark different offers after deductions.

relatedGuides.title: Kenya Salary Tax Guide 2026
relatedGuides.reason: A practical explainer for KRA deductions.

relatedGuides.title: Complete Guide to Kenya Income Tax
relatedGuides.reason: Long-form reference for payroll and filing context.

followUpQuestions.question: What causes the biggest gap between gross and net salary in Kenya?
followUpQuestions.answer: PAYE, housing levy, SHIF, NSSF, and employer-specific payroll setup are the main drivers.

followUpQuestions.question: Who should use the calculator most often?
followUpQuestions.answer: Employees negotiating offers, payroll teams checking deductions, and anyone comparing roles across salary bands.

south-africa-income-tax.label: South Africa Income Tax
south-africa-income-tax.sectionTitle: Model SARS pay, credits, and deductions accurately

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: South African take-home pay depends on SARS brackets, rebates, UIF, retirement contributions, and medical tax credits. Using only the headline bracket usually overstates what you owe.

primaryCta.title: Calculate South Africa PAYE and take-home pay
primaryCta.body: Estimate SARS PAYE, UIF, retirement deductions, and medical credits in one place.
primaryCta.label: Open South Africa PAYE Calculator

relatedTools.reason: Compare offers after UIF, rebates, and deductions.

relatedTools.reason: See how retirement contributions affect tax and planning.

relatedGuides.reason: Fast reference for the current SARS band structure.

relatedGuides.title: Salary After Tax in South Africa
relatedGuides.reason: Use salary examples to benchmark real take-home outcomes.

followUpQuestions.question: Why is my marginal rate not my real tax burden?
followUpQuestions.answer: Because SARS taxes income progressively and then applies rebates and credits that change the effective rate.

followUpQuestions.question: What inputs matter most for accuracy?
followUpQuestions.answer: Age band, retirement deductions, UIF status, and medical-aid membership are the biggest practical drivers.

mobile-money-fees.label: Mobile Money Fees
mobile-money-fees.sectionTitle: Compare transfer cost before you move money

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: Mobile-money fees vary by provider, corridor, transfer size, and transaction type. The cheapest option for a small wallet transfer is not always the cheapest option for cash-out or cross-network transfers.

primaryCta.title: Compare mobile-money fees across providers
primaryCta.body: Model transfer and withdrawal fees before you choose M-Pesa, MoMo, Airtel Money, OPay, or similar rails.
primaryCta.label: Open Mobile Money Fee Tool

relatedTools.title: Currency Converter
relatedTools.reason: Compare fee burden after FX conversion.

relatedTools.title: Remittance Compare
relatedTools.reason: Compare wallet-based transfers with remittance rails.

relatedGuides.title: Mobile Money Fees in Africa Compared
relatedGuides.reason: Cross-country fee patterns and practical examples.

relatedGuides.title: Best Way to Send Money to Kenya
relatedGuides.reason: Useful for corridor-specific comparison.

followUpQuestions.question: What changes the fee most?
followUpQuestions.answer: Transaction size, withdrawal vs wallet transfer, and whether the transaction stays on-network are usually the biggest drivers.

followUpQuestions.question: When should I compare against remittance products?
followUpQuestions.answer: When the transfer crosses borders, includes FX, or lands in cash rather than a wallet balance.

japa-cost.label: Japa and Relocation
japa-cost.sectionTitle: Model the move before you commit

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: Relocation cost is rarely just visa fees. Flights, proof of funds, rent deposits, healthcare setup, and income timing usually matter more than the application fee itself.

primaryCta.title: Estimate your full relocation cost
primaryCta.body: Model visas, travel, settlement cash, and early living costs before you start the move.
primaryCta.label: Open Japa Cost Calculator

relatedTools.title: Currency Converter
relatedTools.reason: Track how FX changes proof-of-funds and savings targets.

relatedTools.title: Student Budget
relatedTools.reason: Useful for education-led relocation plans.

relatedGuides.title: Japa Cost Nigeria
relatedGuides.reason: A practical budgeting guide before relocation.

relatedGuides.title: Relocate Nigeria to Canada
relatedGuides.reason: Country-specific route planning and cost expectations.

followUpQuestions.question: What do people usually underbudget?
followUpQuestions.answer: Rent deposits, temporary accommodation, document costs, and the number of months before stable income starts.

followUpQuestions.question: Why should I compare scenarios?
followUpQuestions.answer: Changing the destination, timing, or housing plan often changes the total cost more than the visa pathway itself.

construction-costs.label: Construction and BOQ
construction-costs.sectionTitle: Turn price research into a usable BOQ

quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
quickAnswer.body: Construction budgets fail when material pricing, labour, contingency, and scope changes are separated. A BOQ-style tool works best when cost research is translated into line items early.

primaryCta.body: Translate material and scope assumptions into a more structured bill of quantities.

relatedTools.reason: Estimate pre-construction and site-prep spend.

relatedGuides.reason: A practical BOQ walkthrough for Nigeria.

relatedGuides.title: Construction Material Prices Nigeria
relatedGuides.reason: Use current price research to improve estimating.

followUpQuestions.question: What causes the biggest BOQ errors?
followUpQuestions.answer: Scope drift, outdated material assumptions, and missing contingency are the most common drivers.

followUpQuestions.question: When should I move from a blog guide into the tool?
followUpQuestions.answer: As soon as you have a draft scope, price assumptions, or a client brief worth turning into an estimate.
